title: Infrastructure-Knowledge
subtitle: Interactive architecture maps & live system directory

viz.title: IPAM 全栈部署手册 · phpIPAM × Foreman × LibreNMS × PowerDNS
viz.desc: 从零复现的 IP 地址管理全栈:phpIPAM(v1.8.1 自包含 MariaDB + Authentik SAML SSO)为 IP 真相源,南向 Foreman smart_proxy_ipam 做 provisioning 自动取 IP(External IPAM),旁挂 LibreNMS SNMP 自动发现,北向对接 PowerDNS 自动建 A/PTR;全 k8s+ArgoCD GitOps。含每步命令、SealedSecret 流程、RouterOS ARP 台账导入、以及 tty:true/APP_TRUSTED_PROXIES/ssl_token/ACS index.php 等全部踩坑修法

viz.title: Lustre LNet 韧性调优 · ko2iblnd 死锁防治
viz.desc: research2 重启后挂不上/丢 OST 的根因复盘:ko2iblnd 特权端口耗尽(-99)致服务端连不上重启过的 client + 服务端 discovery=0 让双口冗余作废。修法 use_privileged_port=0 + 多轨 peer/discovery 一致 + LNet Health 快速失败转移;含参数现状vs建议表、Ansible 落地、零干扰应急手册(lnetctl ping --source / peer add)

viz.title: 农村房改造小机房 · 3D + 施工图
viz.desc: 54㎡ 高密度小机房设计可视化:Three.js 3D 效果图(APC 机柜/列头柜/InRow 行级空调/UPS/FM200 气消)+ 平面/剖面/配电单线/气流施工图;6×10kW IT、热通道封闭、屋顶冷凝、15cm 高架地板;可开关灯/旋转

viz.title: aidc CI/CD 流水线架构
viz.desc: git push → 双push(GitLab先/GitHub后)→ 自托管runner → GitLab内网镜像checkout(1.5s,绕开GFW慢路)→ buildah构建SHA镜像→registry→bump k8s-gitops→ArgoCD上线;含设计理由/关键组件/备份与回滚

viz.title: Foreman Build Pipeline · Rocky 9.7
viz.desc: Build → PXE GRUB2 → Kickstart → Ansible roles: native auto-play vs REX, variable precedence

viz.title: Lustre Server Role 解剖
viz.desc: 5-role sequence, lustre_server 7 stages, prebuilt vs DKMS split, kernel CVE upgrade flow

viz.title: HPC Ubuntu Client 线
viz.desc: HPC_UBUNTU 6 roles: DKMS-follows-kernel, builder .deb chain, IPoIB/mount checklist

viz.title: Transparent Proxy Flow
viz.desc: DNS / direct / proxy / RouterOS split-routing data path

viz.title: Kubernetes Architecture
viz.desc: RKE2 cluster components and traffic topology

viz.title: Zabbix × AIDC Hardware Pipeline
viz.desc: Custom agent → Zabbix → AIDC rack: snapshot, temps/power, locate LED flows

viz.title: BMC / BIOS Firmware Pipeline
viz.desc: Redfish firmware inventory, PVC library and vendor-dispatched BMC/BIOS upgrade state machine

viz.title: AIDC 部署 / 备份恢复手册
viz.desc: 重新部署(代码→镜像 / pod 规格→k8s-gitops+ArgoCD)、备份(PG-HA 日备+Longhorn PVC→nfs01+sealed-secrets)、恢复全流程,含 SHA 镜像/CI 等优化建议

viz.title: AIDC Rack 机柜视图
viz.desc: /racks/{id}/detail aggregates occupants + PDU + health into SVG 28px/U front/rear elevation, status lamps, hover metrics, APC outlet power control
